description: Phase 0: measure per-package src compile footprint (file/LOC count + import-traffic) to rank packages by expected turbopack-memory impact
Phase 0: pick the 1-2 highest-footprint packages for the spike (likely @alga-psa/ui + one of auth/tickets)
Phase 0: fix the spike package build blocker (e.g. @alga-psa/ui esbuild cannot resolve /fonts/*.ttf in TicketDetails.module.css)
Phase 0: configure spike package tsup to emit per-subpath dist entries (glob) matching the deep import depth consumers use
Phase 0: verify spike package dist resolves a representative deep import (e.g. dist/components/Button.mjs exists and exports the component)
Phase 0: complete spike package package.json exports to cover every used sub-path segment (incl. presence, context/*)
Phase 0: remove the spike package's @alga-psa/* -> src entries from turbopack.resolveAlias
Phase 0: ensure spike package dist is built (nx build) before next build in the measured command
Phase 0: run scripts/build-mem.sh >=3x with spike dist-aliasing; record peak + dur + ok
Phase 0 GATE: decide go/no-go - proceed only if peak drop > ~1GB noise, build green, time within variance; else stop + document
Phase 1: for each remaining in-scope package, fix build blockers
Phase 1: configure each remaining package's tsup to emit per-subpath dist entries
Phase 1: complete each remaining package's exports map for all used sub-paths
Phase 2: wire all in-scope packages into nx build-deps so dist is fresh + correctly ordered before next build
Phase 2: remove all in-scope @alga-psa/* -> src entries from turbopack.resolveAlias (keep @, server/src, EE, emoji aliases)
Phase 2: npm run build passes (exit 0 + .next/BUILD_ID + route manifests) with full dist consumption
Phase 3: final harness measurement (median of >=3) confirms peak < ~9900 MB
Phase 3: total build wall-clock within variance of 58 s baseline
Phase 3: bring up a live test environment (alga env skill) for the worktree
Phase 3: open an algadev browser pane and smoke login -> MSP dashboard
Phase 3: smoke tickets list -> ticket detail (rich-text editor renders/edits)
Phase 3: smoke clients list + a settings page (high @alga-psa/ui sub-path traffic)
Phase 3: confirm no console import/module-resolution errors during smoke
Update PRD/features/tests/scratchpad with outcome; commit result (win or documented stop)
